plan_compare_two_concepts.reason: Plan ran and completed. Reply rubric partially met — cited workspace.md well but claimed no direct P5-Permission connection, did not produce 3-5 concrete points citing BOTH docs.

plan_explain_with_code_references.reason: LLM answered correctly by reading plan.py and planner.py directly, without invoking plan. must_emit requires plan_emitted>=1. Reply quality good; routing choice rational.

plan_summary_across_n_files.reason: Plan ran and completed. Reply said docs not found (wrong reyn_src_read path: 'principles.md' vs 'docs/concepts/principles.md'). Plan lifecycle correct, reply refuted.

narr-1-mcp-search.reason: MCP registry unreachable in environment. Without --allow-unsafe-python: skill_run_failed. With --allow-unsafe-python: workflow_aborted (registry unavailable).

narr-3-skill-builder.reason: Skill ran and completed. Narration is spawn-ack only; skill_completion_injected not observable within session. Skill created at reyn/local/string_length_calculator.

s-fp11-1-builder-invalid-spec.reason: Session closed before skill_run_completed. Narration not observable.

s-fp11-2-eval-missing-target.reason: skill_run_failed (control block missing in phase). Narration was spawn-ack. D1 anti-optimism not verifiable.

s-fp11-3-mcp-search-empty.reason: Skill ran and completed (registry unreachable path). Narration was /tasks only. D3 not observable.

s-fp12-spawn-1-builder-success-ack.reason: D2+D5 verified. D3 completion narration not observable (session closed before skill_completion_injected).

s-fp12-completion-1-mcp-search-narrate.reason: MCP registry unreachable. LLM then attempted self-message (agent.peer__dogfood-b28-6).

s-fp12-completion-2-error-narrate.reason: Expected_status=error but skill_builder completed (created skill despite circular-ref request). Narration was /tasks.

h1_plan_tool_present.evidence: plan is first tool in main router tools array (14 tools: plan, list_actions, describe_action, invoke_action, ...)

plan_40_description_fix.evidence: steps_json uses 'invoke_action' in tools fields, not legacy tool names like reyn_src_read

c1_no_duplicate_functions.evidence: All requests checked, 0 duplicate tool names found

issues_found.description: Plan step LLMs call reyn_src_read with short paths (e.g. 'principles.md') instead of full paths ('docs/concepts/principles.md'). Causes file not found in multi-source scenarios.
LLM fails to escape inner quotes in steps_json JSON string when user prompt contains quoted phrases. Results in plan_invalid JSON parse error.
MCP registry endpoint not reachable in test environment. narr-1 and s-fp12-completion-1 blocked.
skill_completion_injected does not fire within CUI session because skills complete after session close. D3 observability requires multi-turn approach or longer session.
LLM routed to agent.peer__dogfood-b28-6 (itself) after mcp_search failure. Self-message error surfaced correctly.
